data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Netflix employs a microservices architecture to improve scalability and manageability.
data.technical_spec: APIs connect multiple small, independently deployable services.

data.title: Global CDN
data.description: Netflix uses a global content delivery network to distribute streaming content efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Leverages Open Connect Appliances in ISP networks.

data.title: Cloud-based Infrastructure
data.description: Most Netflix services are deployed on cloud platforms.
data.technical_spec: Primarily hosted on Amazon Web Services (AWS) for flexibility and scalability.

data.title: NoSQL Database System
data.description: Database strategy optimizes for availability, partition tolerance, and consistency.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes DynamoDB, Cassandra, and other NoSQL technologies.

data.title: Service Discovery
data.description: Automated service discovery for components to communicate efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes tools like Eureka for real-time service location.
